summary: The diff modifies LocationMapExplorer.tsx to address all four requirements. The file summary explicitly confirms: Time Zone and Global Control buttons use left-side Popover components (REQ-1, REQ-2), local time display is included in the Time Zone popup (REQ-3), and Font Size control is added to the Global Control popup (REQ-4). The code snippet shows the TimeZonePopoverContent component with local time computation logic, UTC offset helpers, and the necessary imports including the Type icon for font size.
